summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MANO Stripe integration and document downloads. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend Pricing and Downloads pages working correctly. Stripe checkout redirect flow verified for both individual and family plans.
passed_tests: Checkout status for invalid session returns error
Checkout status for valid session returns status
Pricing page loads with 15-day guarantee text
Pricing page shows all 7 subscription plans with correct EUR prices
All subscribe buttons have data-testid attributes
Weekly subscribe button redirects to Stripe checkout (€9.99)
Family yearly subscribe button redirects to Stripe checkout (€399.99)
Downloads page loads with 4 document cards
All download buttons have data-testid attributes
Business plan download triggers file download with success toast
seed_data_creation: None - tests use demo user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library with sk_test_emergent key. All 7 subscription packages (weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly, family-monthly, family-quarterly, family-yearly) create valid checkout sessions. Document downloads serve markdown files from /app/memory/ directory. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls and window.location.origin for Stripe redirect URLs.
